---
title: "migrate_to_qmd.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/migrate_to_qmd.py"
loc: 56
complexity: 11
logic_score: 2.25
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 7.11
overall_score: 4.57
---

## Intent
Core semantic routing engine for intent resolution.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate SovereignEngine and invoke run(query) to process natural language directives.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [hashlib](file://hashlib)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `MigrationEngine`
- `get_checksum`
- `migrate_file`
- `main`
